title: Ember Installed Capacity Monthly
description:
Get installed wind and solar capacity in a monthly grain.
    e.g.

`https://api.ember-energy.org/v1/installed-capacity/monthly?is_aggregate_entity=false&series=Solar,Wind&start_date=2020-01&api_key=MY_API_KEY`
    

The methodology of this dataset can be found on its [dataset page](https://ember-energy.org/data/monthly-wind-and-solar-capacity-data/)
    within the 'Methodology - Monthly Wind and Solar Capacity Data' pdf.
